name: SayThis
description: One-click pronunciation help for highlighted text.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://www.wikidata.org https://en.wiktionary.org https://commons.wikimedia.org https://upload.wikimedia.org; media-src 'self' https://commons.wikimedia.org https://upload.wikimedia.org
